subfinder.network_behavior: Queries 3rd party APIs. No direct packets to target.

amass.network_behavior: Queries APIs. May scrape target infrastructure if active mode is used.
amass.defender_visibility: 10% - DNS resolution logs on target nameservers.
amass.evasion_notes: Use passive mode strictly for zero detection.

httpx.network_behavior: Performs fast HTTP GET requests to resolve live web servers.
httpx.defender_visibility: 20% - WAF/CDN logs will show mass HTTP GET requests to root path.
httpx.evasion_notes: Slow threads or use random user-agents to blend in.

naabu.network_behavior: SYN port scanning across all specified ports.
naabu.defender_visibility: 80% - Core firewalls boundary routers will alert on SYN sweeps.
naabu.evasion_notes: Use source IP spoofing or scan via proxychains.

dnsx.network_behavior: Mass DNS resolution using specific resolvers.
dnsx.defender_visibility: 5% - Only visible if querying target's authoritative nameservers directly.

ffuf.defender_visibility: 95% - Triggers standard WAF rules for directory brute forcing (404 spikes).
ffuf.evasion_notes: Use delay between requests, jitter, and rotate IP/User-Agents.

dirsearch.evasion_notes: Requires significant rate-limiting to evade detection.

nuclei.network_behavior: Sends heavily malformed requests mimicking known exploits.
nuclei.defender_visibility: 99% - SIEM alerts on standard Nuclei standard payloads/headers.

gitleaks.network_behavior: Locally scans cloned repositories or fetched files.
gitleaks.defender_visibility: 0% - Operates entirely locally off downloaded data.

katana.network_behavior: Crawls web pages, following links and extracting endpoints.
katana.evasion_notes: Set custom User-Agent to mimic Googlebot to reduce casual blocking.

gau.network_behavior: Fetches known URLs from AlienVault OTX, Wayback Machine, etc.
gau.defender_visibility: 0% - Queries external sources, not the target.

dalfox.network_behavior: Injects XSS payloads into parameters and headers.
dalfox.defender_visibility: 100% - Highly noisy, triggers basic XSS WAF rules.

subjack.network_behavior: Queries CNAME records and checks if destination service is vulnerable to takeover.
subjack.defender_visibility: 5% - Simple DNS resolution and selective HTTP GET to cloud providers.
